sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 107 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.27 2. For orders on CMA No.1023/2024 3. For hearing of main case 28.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Din Qazi, advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Faheem Bhayo, advocate for the applicant This matter is pending since 2024 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. Diary demonstrates that in past two years applicant has not made any effort to have the matter listed; even today brief is being held and adjournment is being sought for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that the applicant department is not interested in proceeding with the matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
